hero.bio: Building performant React apps with clean architecture and exceptional UX.

about.title: Passionate about
about.subtitle: I turn complex requirements into elegant, maintainable React applications.
about.bio_1: I'm a Middle React Developer from Azerbaijan with 3+ years of hands-on experience building production-grade SPAs. I've taken projects from zero to launch — including AI-powered platforms, e-commerce dashboards, and SaaS tools.
about.bio_2: My expertise lies in Redux Toolkit, TypeScript, and building reusable design systems with Tailwind CSS. I care deeply about code quality, performance, and developer experience.
about.bio_3: Outside of code, I contribute to open source, stay current with the React ecosystem, and mentor junior developers.

architecture.title: Clean Architecture
architecture.desc: Scalable folder structures, separation of concerns, and reusable component patterns.

performance.title: Performance First
performance.desc: Lazy loading, code splitting, memoization — 90+ Lighthouse scores by default.

ui.title: Pixel-Perfect UI
ui.desc: Translating Figma designs to life with precise attention to spacing, typography, and motion.

types.title: Type Safety
types.desc: Strict TypeScript across the board. Types are documentation that never lies.

skills.title: My
skills.subtitle: Technologies I use daily to build scalable, performant web applications.

experience.title: My
experience.subtitle: From junior developer to leading full-stack projects in 3 years.

projects.title: Things I've
projects.subtitle: Production applications I've built and shipped, from idea to deployment.

contact.title: Let's
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Let's build something great.
contact.open_desc: Currently available for freelance projects and full-time positions. Let's build something amazing together.
